note: 2026-04-26: enabled 1h SJM filter (use_1h_filter=true, trend_filter_1h=sjm). Was filter-OFF since deploy. Trigger: 6 live trades = 4W/2L but net -$253 because the 2 losers had FE<1 ATR (entries were wrong from the start). 41d head-to-head with params held fixed: filter-OFF baseline -$231 → SJM +$79 (delta +$310). SJM cuts entries 31→13 (60%), lifts WR 66.7%→79.2%, PF 0.79→1.19. Other variants tested (ema_cross, structure, both_agree, hma_slope) all worse or no-op.
